testcase.name: test_create_batch_with_additional_costs
testcase.failure: tests/test_receive_repack_features.py:90: in test_create_batch_with_additional_costs assert batch['additional_costs_total'] == 800, f"Expected additional_costs_total=800, got {batch['additional_costs_total']}" E AssertionError: Expected additional_costs_total=800, got 0.0 E assert 0.0 == 800

testcase.name: test_create_receive_entry

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 1 finished_product with source='receive', found 0 assert 0 == 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/test_receive_repack_features.py:182: in test_create_receive_entry assert len(receive_fp) == 1, f"Expected 1 finished_product with source='receive', found {len(receive_fp)}" E AssertionError: Expected 1 finished_product with source='receive', found 0 E assert 0 == 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_setup_stock_for_repack

skipped.message: Need at least 2 finished product masters for repack testing

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_receive_repack_features.py:231: Need at least 2 finished product masters for repack testing

testcase.name: test_list_repacks

failure.message: AssertionError: Test repack entry not found in list assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/test_receive_repack_features.py:309: in test_list_repacks assert len(test_repacks) >= 1, "Test repack entry not found in list" E AssertionError: Test repack entry not found in list E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

skipped.message: Need at least 2 finished product masters for ledger testing

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_receive_repack_features.py:344: Need at least 2 finished product masters for ledger testing

testcase.name: test_ledger_includes_receive_type

failure.message: AttributeError: type object 'TestFinishedLedger' has no attribute 'source_sku'

testcase.failure: tests/test_receive_repack_features.py:385: in test_ledger_includes_receive_type source_ledger = [l for l in ledger if l['sku'] == self.__class__.source_sku] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_receive_repack_features.py:385: in <listcomp> source_ledger = [l for l in ledger if l['sku'] == self.__class__.source_sku] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: type object 'TestFinishedLedger' has no attribute 'source_sku'

failure.message: AttributeError: type object 'TestFinishedLedger' has no attribute 'source_sku'
